issues.title: Double tasks generated for Loan Simple leads in pre-referral and post-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were receiving duplicate tasks across the pre-referral and post-referral workflows. The issue was traced to a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed the fix.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or delete the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs continued receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow lacked proper unenrollment filters for these terminal deal stages. A tweak to the workflow filters was made to address the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any stale check-in tasks for deals that were marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering TC tasks when deal stage toggled back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then back to Referred Active or Committed, and then back to Offer Accepted again, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. The re-enrollment criteria was updated to fix this.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change on a deal
issues.desc: After a loan officer was updated on a deal, automated emails sent to agents continued to display the previous LO's information instead of the new one. The issue was identified as a product-side problem. Luis resolved the issue.
issues.workaround: For deals where the LO was changed during the impact window, manually send the agent introduction email with the correct LO information.

issues.title: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals that were updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow, meaning TCs were not receiving their tasks. The issue was escalated to HubSpot support. HubSpot confirmed a fix was applied.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted during the impact window into the TC workflow to ensure closing tasks are completed.

issues.title: Pre-referral workflow SMS sending outside of permitted hours (late evening)
issues.desc: A lead enrolled in the Pre-Referral Workflow received an SMS at 8:10 PM CST, outside the intended sending window. Investigation revealed some older workflows had sending hours set to 8:30 AM without proper timezone constraints, and a potential bug with HubSpot's time-window settings was suspected. A fix was identified on the Twilio end to address sending hour constraints.
issues.workaround: No action required for past messages; monitor new leads going forward to confirm SMS sends within approved hours.
